query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS skill_certifications (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  code VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  description TEXT,
  departmentId INT,
  departmentCode VARCHAR(50),
  level ENUM('apprentice', 'journeyman', 'master', 'expert') NOT NULL,
  prerequisiteCertifications JSON,
  requiredTrainingHours INT DEFAULT 0,
  requiredPracticeHours INT DEFAULT 0,
  assessmentRequired BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  validityMonths INT DEFAULT 24,
  renewalRequirements JSON,
  premiumTier ENUM('standard', 'premium', 'elite') DEFAULT 'standard' NOT NULL,
  assessmentFee DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  renewalFee DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  badgeUrl TEXT,
  badgeColor VARCHAR(20),
  displayOrder INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS skill_certifications (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  code VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  description TEXT,
  departmentId INT,
  departmentCode VARCHAR(50),
  level ENUM('apprentice', 'journeyman', 'master', 'expert') NOT NULL,
  prerequisiteCertifications JSON,
  requiredTrainingHours INT DEFAULT 0,
  requiredPracticeHours INT DEFAULT 0,
  assessmentRequired BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  validityMonths INT DEFAULT 24,
  renewalRequirements JSON,
  premiumTier ENUM('standard', 'premium', 'elite') DEFAULT 'standard' NOT NULL,
  assessmentFee DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  renewalFee DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  badgeUrl TEXT,
  badgeColor VARCHAR(20),
  displayOrder INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
